reach_why: It critiques known issues in search, relevance, analogy, and self-evaluation rather than opening a clearly new explanatory domain.
novelty_why: It non-obviously links problem selection, equivalence standards, irrelevant truths, and undefined thresholds into one failure model.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable, but the central threshold critique lacks operational definitions, limiting decisive empirical refutation.
explanation: More outputs do not ensure explanatory progress; relevance, equivalence, and measurable reliability thresholds determine whether explanation succeeds.
